features: Children's Colouring books with easy tear-off sheets. This set of 4 books are 4 different themed books, all with vibrantly coloured covers to help engage the child.
Inside the book, each page includes an interesting and clear design to colour, as well as a fun quote for added fun.
Each book contains 32 pages with easy tear-off sheets.
Useful sized colouring books are perfect for traveling and fun at home.
Ideal for children aged 3-6 for keeping them entertained for hours.
Dimensions of the books are 240 x 170mm
